steps.title: Compare the equations
steps.content:
Divide every term in the second equation by $2$:
$$30x+2y=26$$
$$15x+y=13$$

steps.title: Identify the same line
steps.content: The simplified second equation is identical to the first equation. That means both equations describe the same line, so every point on that line solves the system. Choice A would require one intersection point, choice B is not possible for two lines, and choice D would require parallel lines with different intercepts.

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graph both equations; the two graphs overlap completely, which means there are infinitely many solutions. The answer is C.
